name: Tilt It Addictive Arcade Skill Game
description: Tilt It is a challenging arcade-style skill game inspired by classic bar balance mechanics. The player controls a horizontal stick with a ball resting on it and must carefully tilt the stick left and right to guide the ball upward toward the final green goal hole. Game Mode Endless skill-based arcade mode High score challenge Levels Dynamic obstacle patterns Increasing speed and difficulty Features Smooth physics controls Simple and responsive gameplay Sound on/off option Pause and restart functionality Mobile and desktop optimized Tilt It is perfect for players who enjoy reflex-based skill games and high-score challenge
